title: ANIMAL POISON CONTROL CENTER - 211info
text: AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS ANIMAL POISON CONTROL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hotline for animal poison-related emergencies. The hotline is staffed by veterinarians and board-certified veterinary toxicologists. Website provides general information to help protect pets from poisonous substances, including plants, human foods, and human medications. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 426-4435 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (888) 426-4435 Animal Poison Control Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Callers will be asked about their pet's health and exposure to assess the risk to the animal. They will then be provided with recommendations for treatment either at home or from a veterinary medical professional. FEES: $95 consultation fee for calls, payable by credit card DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Animal Poison Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS
